MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Zi Sheng Xu, Elden Hong Lei, Maggie Jun Lei, Gold Shield Medline Group, Inc., Gold Wing Trading, Inc., Goldwings Medical Tradings, Inc., Gold Shield Medline Medical Supply, Inc., May Xu, Ivan Lam and Vincent Luu.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:00 a.m.

Jeffrey L. Mendelman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Nexgen Medical Company, LLC.
Joe Tatis, President and Co-Owner of plaintiff Nexgen Medical Company, LLC. and Custodian of Records was present, placed under oath and testified.
Tim French, Corporate Counsel for plaintiff Nexgen Medical Company, LLC. was also present.
Messrs. Mendelman, Tatis and French appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by any of the defendants.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract(4) Fraud and Conspiracy to Commit Fraud, Breach of Covenant of Good Faith and Fair Dealing, Unjust Enrichment and Intentional Inference with Contractual Relations filed December 9, 2020.

DOE defendants were DISMISSED on May 3, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Nexgen Medical Company, LLC., and against defendants Zi Sheng Xu, Elden Hong Lei, Maggie Jun Lei, Gold Shield Medline Group, Inc., Gold Wing Trading, Inc., Goldwings Medical Tradings, Inc., Gold Shield Medline Medical Supply, Inc., May Xu, Ivan Lam and Vincent Luu., Jointly and Severally as follows:
